class.name: PDFDocument
class.description: The default coordinate system of PDF: the lower-left corner is at coordinates (0, 0), and the upper-right corner is at coordinates (width, height). The default resolution is 72dpi. Please note that currently when running from a pack file (.pck) trying to load files directly from "res://" will fail. (For example pdf.font_load_ttf_from_file("res://some_font.ttf"); will not work.) Either use _from_mem (for example font_load_ttf_from_mem()) versions of methods, or copy the needed files out from "res://" to somewhere else (probably "user://").

method.name: compression_mode_set
method.description: Set the mode of compression. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_INVALID_COMPRESSION_MODE - An invalid compression mode was specified. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.

method.name: document_has
method.description: If the document handle is valid, it returns true, and false otherwise.

method.name: document_new
method.description: Creates a new document. If the Document object already has a document, the current document is revoked. Returns OK on success. Error codes: - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - Invalid document handle set. - EC_FAILED_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.

method.name: encoder_current_get
method.description: Gets the handle of the current encoder of the document object. The default value of it is NULL. It returns a handle of an encoder object or NULL.

method.name: encoder_current_set
method.description: Sets the handle of the current encoder of the document object. encoding_name - The name of an encoding. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_ENCODING_NAME - An invalid encoding name was set.

method.name: encoder_get
method.description: Gets the handle of an encoder object by specified encoding name. encoding_name - A valid encoding name. (See Encodings) Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_ENCODING_NAME - An invalid encoding name was set.

method.name: encodings_use_cns
method.description: It makes simplified Chinese Encodings(GB-EUC-H, GB-EUC-V, GBK-EUC-H, GBK-EUC-V) to become available. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_DUPLICATE_REGISTRATION - The encoding of the same name has already been registered.

method.name: encodings_use_cnt
method.description: It makes traditional Chinese Encodings(ETen-B5-H, ETen-B5-V) to become available. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_DUPLICATE_REGISTRATION - The encoding of the same name has already been registered.

method.name: encodings_use_jp
method.description: It makes Japanese Encodings(90ms-RKSJ-H, 90ms-RKSJ-V, 90msp-RKSJ-H, EUC-H, EUC-V) to become available. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_DUPLICATE_REGISTRATION - The encoding of the same name has already been registered.

method.name: encodings_use_kr
method.description: It makes Korean Encodings (KSC-EUC-H, KSC-EUC-V, KSCms-UHC-H, KSCms-UHC-HW-H, KSCms-UHC-HW-V) to become available. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_DUPLICATE_REGISTRATION - The encoding of the same name has already been registered.

method.name: encodings_use_utf
method.description: Enables UTF-8 encodings. After this is called, an application can include UTF-8 encoded Unicode text (up to 3-byte UTF-8 sequences only). An application can use the following Unicode encodings (but only with TrueType fonts): UTF-8 Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_DUPLICATE_REGISTRATION - The encoding of the same name has already been registered.

method.name: encryption_mode_set
method.description: Set the encryption mode. As the side effect, ups the version of PDF to 1.4 when the mode is set to HPDF_ENCRYPT_R3. key_len - Specify the byte length of encryption key. Only valid for HPDF_ENCRYPT_R3. Between 5 (40 bits) and 16 (128 bits) can be specified. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_INVALID_ENCRYPT_KEY_LEN - An invalid key length was specified. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.

method.name: font_get
method.description: Gets the handle of a requested font object. Built-in fonts: - "Courier", "Courier-Bold", "Courier-Oblique", "Courier-BoldOblique" - "Helvetica", "Helvetica-Bold", "Helvetica-Oblique", "Helvetica-BoldOblique" - "Times-Roman", "Times-Bold", "Times-Italic", "Times-BoldItalic" - "Symbol", "ZapfDingbats" Error codes - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_INVALID_FONT_NAME - An invalid font name was set. - EC_INVALID_ENCODING_NAME - An invalid encoding name was set. - EC_UNSUPPORTED_FONT_TYPE - An unsupported font type was set.

method.name: font_load_ttf_from_collection_file
method.description: Loads a TrueType font from an TrueType collection file and register it to a document object. file_name - A path of a TrueType font collection file (.ttc). index - The index of font to be loaded. embed_into_document - If this parameter is set to true, the glyph data of the font is embedded, otherwise only the matrix data is included in PDF file. Returns the name of a font, or an empty string. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_FONT_EXISTS - The font of the same name has already been registered. - EC_INVALID_TTC_INDEX, HPDF_INVALID_TTC_FILE, HPDF_TTF_INVALID_CMAP, HPDF_TTF_INVALID_FOMAT, HPDF_TTF_MISSING_TABLE - Failed to load .ttf file. - EC_TTF_CANNOT_EMBEDDING_FONT - The font is not allowed to embed. - EC_INVALID_TTC_INDEX - The value specified at index parameter exceeds the number of fonts.

method.name: font_load_ttf_from_file
method.description: Loads a TrueType font from an external file and register it to a document object. file_name - A path of a TrueType font file (.ttf). embed_into_document - If this parameter is set to true, the glyph data of the font is embedded, otherwise only the matrix data is included in PDF file. Returns the name of a font, or an empty string. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_FONT_EXISTS - The font of the same name has already been registered. - EC_INVALID_TTC_INDEX - Failed to load .ttf file. - EC_INVALID_TTC_FILE - Failed to load .ttf file. - EC_TTF_INVALID_CMAP - Failed to load .ttf file. - EC_TTF_INVALID_FOMAT - Failed to load .ttf file. - EC_TTF_MISSING_TABLE - Failed to load .ttf file. - EC_TTF_CANNOT_EMBEDDING_FONT - The font is not allowed to embed.

method.name: font_load_type_1_from_file
method.description: Loads a Type1 font from an external file and registers it in the document object. afm_file_name - A path of an AFM file. data_file_name - A path of a PFA/PFB file. If NULL, the glyph data of font file is not embedded to a PDF file. Returns the name of a font, or an empty string. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_FONT_EXISTS - The font of the same name has already been registered. - EC_INVALID_AFM_HEADER, HPDF_INVALID_CHAR_MATRICS_DATA, HPDF_INVALID_N_DATA - Cannot recognize AFM file. - EC_UNSUPPORTED_TYPE1_FONT - Cannot recognize PFA/PFB file.

method.name: fonts_use_cns
method.description: Enables simplified Chinese fonts. After this is called, an application can use the following simplified Chinese fonts: - "SimSun", "SimSun,Bold", "SimSun,Italic", "SimSun,BoldItalic". - "SimHei", "SimHei,Bold", "SimHei,Italic", "SimHei,BoldItalic". Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_DUPLICATE_REGISTRATION - The font of the same name has already been registered.

method.name: fonts_use_cnt
method.description: Enables traditional Chinese fonts. After this is called, an application can use the following traditional Chinese fonts: - "MingLiU", "MingLiU,Bold", "MingLiU,Italic", "MingLiU,BoldItalic". Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_DUPLICATE_REGISTRATION - The font of the same name has already been registered.

method.name: fonts_use_jp
method.description: Enables Japanese fonts. After this is called, an application can use the following Japanese fonts: - "MS-Mincyo", "MS-Mincyo,Bold", "MS-Mincyo,Italic", "MS-Mincyo,BoldItalic". - "MS-Gothic", "MS-Gothic,Bold", "MS-Gothic,Italic", "MS-Gothic,BoldItalic". - "MS-PMincyo", "MS-PMincyo,Bold", "MS-PMincyo,Italic", "MS-PMincyo,BoldItalic". - "MS-PGothic", "MS-PGothic,Bold", "MS-PGothic,Italic", "MS-PGothic,BoldItalic". Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_DUPLICATE_REGISTRATION - The font of the same name has already been registered.

method.name: fonts_use_kr
method.description: Enables Korean fonts. After this is called, an application can use the following Korean fonts: - "DotumChe", "DotumChe,Bold", "DotumChe,Italic", "DotumChe,BoldItalic". - "Dotum", "Dotum,Bold", "Dotum,Italic", "Dotum,BoldItalic". - "BatangChe", "BatangChe,Bold", "BatangChe,Italic", "BatangChe,BoldItalic". - "Batang", "Batang,Bold", "Batang,Italic", "Batang,BoldItalic". Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_DUPLICATE_REGISTRATION - The font of the same name has already been registered.

method.name: get_error_no
method.description: HPDF_GetError returns the last error code of the document object.

method.name: get_status
method.description: The last returned status.

method.name: image_load_jpg_from_file
method.description: Loads an external JPEG image file. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_UNSUPPORTED_JPEG_FORMAT - Invalid/unsupported JPEG image was passed.

method.name: image_load_jpg_from_mem
method.description: Loads JPEG image from a buffer. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_JPEG_DATA - Invalid JPEG image was passed. - EC_UNSUPPORTED_JPEG_FORMAT - Invalid/unsupported JPEG image was passed.

method.name: image_load_png_from_file
method.description: Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_UNSUPPORTED_FUNC - The library is not configured to use PNGLIB. - EC_LIBPNG_ERROR - Failed when invoking PNGLIB's function. - EC_INVALID_PNG_IMAGE - Invalid PNG format.

method.name: image_load_png_from_file_delayed
method.description: oads an external PNG image file. It does not load all the data immediately (only size and color properties are loaded). The main data are loaded just before the image object is written to PDF, and the loaded data are deleted immediately. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_UNSUPPORTED_FUNC - The library is not configured to use PNGLIB. - EC_LIBPNG_ERROR - Failed when invoking PNGLIB's function. - EC_INVALID_PNG_IMAGE - Invalid PNG format.

method.name: image_load_png_from_mem
method.description: Loads PNG image from a buffer. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_PNG_IMAGE - Invalid PNG format.

method.name: image_load_raw_image_from_file
method.description: loads an image which has "raw" image format. This function loads the data without any conversion. So it is usually faster than the other functions. - filename - A path to a image file. - width - The width of an image file. - height - The height of an image file. - color_space - COLOR_SPACE_DEVICE_GRAY, COLOR_SPACE_DEVICE_RGB or COLOR_SPACE_DEVICE_CMYK. - COLOR_SPACE_DEVICE_GRAY - 8 bit gray scale image The gray scale describes each pixel with one byte. For each byte, 0X00 is maximum dark, 0XFF maximum light. The size of the image data is (width * height) bytes. The sequence of bytes for an 8-pixel 8-bit image with 2 rows and 4 columns would be: - 1 2 3 4 - 5 6 7 8 - COLOR_SPACE_DEVICE_RGB - 24 bit RGB color image The 24 bit RGB color image describes each pixel with three bytes (Red, Green, Blue). For each byte, 0X00 is maximum dark, 0XFF maximum light. The size of the image data is (width * height * 3) bytes. The sequence of bytes for an 8-pixel 24-bit image with 2 rows and 4 columns would be: - 1R 1G 1B 2R 2G 2B 3R 3G 3B 4R 4G 4B - 5R 5G 5B 6R 6G 6B 7R 7G 7B 8R 8G 8B - COLOR_SPACE_DEVICE_CMYK - 32 bit CMYK color image. The 32 bit CMYK color image describes each pixel with four bytes (Cyan, Magenta, Yellow, Black). The size of the image data is (width * height * 4) bytes. For each byte, 0X00 is maximum dark, 0XFF maximum light. The sequence of bytes for an 8-pixel 32-bit image with 2 rows and 4 columns would be: - 1C 1M 1Y 1K 2C 2M 2Y 2K 3C 3M 3Y 3K 4C 4M 4Y 4K - 5C 5M 5Y 5K 6C 6M 6Y 6K 7C 7M 7Y 7K 8C 8M 8Y 8K Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_COLOR_SPACE - An invalid color_space value is specified. - EC_INVALID_IMAGE - The size of an image data is invalid. - EC_FILE_IO_ERROR - Cannot read data from the file.

method.name: image_load_raw_image_from_mem
method.description: Loads an image which has "raw" image format from buffer. This function loads the data without any conversion. So it is usually faster than the other functions. bits_per_component - The bit size of each color component. The valid value is either 1, 2, 4, 8. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_COLOR_SPACE - An invalid color_space value is specified. - EC_INVALID_IMAGE - The size of an image data is invalid.

method.name: info_attr_date_set
method.description: Sets a datetime attribute in the info dictionary. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_PARAMETER - An invalid type parameter was set. - EC_INVALID_DATE_TIME - An invalid datetime value was set.

method.name: info_attr_get
method.description: Gets an attribute value from info dictionary. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_PARAMETER - An invalid type parameter was set.

method.name: info_attr_set
method.description: Sets the text of an info dictionary attribute, using current encoding of the document. If encoding is not set, PDFDocEncoding is used. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_PARAMETER - An invalid type parameter was set.

method.name: open_action_set
method.description: Set the first page to appear when a document is opened. When succeeds, it returns OK. Error codes: - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_DESTINATION - An invalid destination object was set.

method.name: outline_create
method.description: Creates a new outline object. - parent - The handle of an outline object which comes to the parent of the created outline object. If NULL, the outline is created as a root outline. - title - The caption of the outline object. - encoder - The handle of an encoding object applied to the title. If NULL, PDFDocEncoding is used. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_OUTLINE - An invalid parent outline is specified.

method.name: page_add
method.description: Creates a new page and adds it after the last page of a document. Error codes: - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.

method.name: page_add_label
method.description: Adds a page labeling range for the document. The page label is shown in the thumbnails view. page_num - The first page that applies this labeling range. Error codes: - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_PAGE_NUM_STYLE_OUT_OF_RANGE - An invalid page numbering style is specified.

method.name: page_get_current
method.description: Returns the handle of current page object.

method.name: page_insert
method.description: Creates a new page and inserts it just before the specified page. Error codes: - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_PAGE - An invalid page handle was set.

method.name: pages_set_configuration
method.description: In the default setting, a HPDF_Doc object has one "Pages" object as root of pages. All "Page" objects are created as a kid of the "Pages" object. Since a "Pages" object can own only 8191 kids objects, the maximum number of pages are 8191 page. Additionally, the state that there are a lot of "Page" object under one "Pages" object is not good, because it causes performance degradation of a viewer application. An application can change the setting of a pages tree by invoking pages_set_configuration(). If page_per_pages parameter is set to more than zero, a two-tier pages tree is created. A root "Pages" object can own 8191 "Pages" object, and each lower "Pages" object can own page_per_pages "Page" objects. As a result, the maximum number of pages becomes 8191 * page_per_pages page. An application cannot invoke pages_set_configuration() after a page is added to document. When it succeeds, it returns OK. Error codes: - HPDF_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle is set. - HPDF_INVALID_DOCUMENT_STATE - A page object already exists in a document. - HPDF_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.

method.name: password_set
method.description: sets a password for the document. If the password is set, document contents are encrypted. - owner_password - The password for the owner of the document. The owner can change the permission of the document. NULL, zero length string, and the same value as user password are not allowed. - user_password - The password for the user of the document. The user_password may be set to NULL or zero length string. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_INVALID_PASSWORD - Owner password is NULL, zero length string, or same value as user password.

method.name: permission_set
method.description: Set the permission flags for the document. permission - One or more of the following, "ored" together: - PERMISSION_ENABLE_READ - user can read the document. - PERMISSION_ENABLE_PRINT - user can print the document. - PERMISSION_ENABLE_EDIT_ALL - user can edit the contents of the document other than annotations, form fields. - PERMISSION_ENABLE_COPY - user can copy the text and the graphics of the document. - PERMISSION_ENABLE_EDIT - user can add or modify the annotations and form fields of the document. Error codes - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle was set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.

method.name: reset_error
method.description: Once an error code is set, IO processing functions cannot be invoked. In the case of executing a function after the cause of the error is fixed, an application have to invoke this to clear error-code before executing functions.

method.name: save_to_file
method.description: Saves the current document to a file. Returns OK on success. Error codes: - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle is set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed. - EC_FILE_IO_ERROR - An error occurred while processing file I/O.

method.name: save_to_mem
method.description: Saves the current document to a PoolByteArray. Sets status to OK on success. Error codes: - EC_INVALID_DOCUMENT - An invalid document handle is set. - EC_FAILD_TO_ALLOC_MEM - Memory allocation failed.

members.member: How the page should be displayed. If this attribute is not set, the setting of the viewer application is used. Sets the status variable.
Sets how the document should be displayed. Sets the status variable.

constants.constant: No compression.
Compress the contents stream of the page.
Compress the streams of the image objects.
Other stream datas (fonts, cmaps and so on) are compressed.
All stream datas are compressed (HPDF_COMP_TEXT | HPDF_COMP_IMAGE | HPDF_COMP_METADATA).
Only one page is displayed.
Display the pages in one column.
Display in two columns. Odd page number is displayed left.
Display in two columns. Odd page number is displayed right.
Display in two pages. Odd page number is displayed left.
Display in two pages. Odd page number is displayed right.
If page layout is not set.
Display the document with neither outline nor thumbnail.
Display the document with outline pane.
Display the document with thumbnail pane.
Display the document with full screen mode.
If not set.
Arabic numerals (1 2 3 4).
Uppercase roman numerals (I II III IV).
Lowercase roman numerals (i ii iii iv).
Uppercase letters (A B C D).
Lowercase letters (a b c d).
Off.
Use "Revision 2" algorithm. "key_len" automatically set to 5 (40 bits).
Use "Revision 3" algorithm. "key_len" can be 5 (40 bits) to 16 (128bits).
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Data length > HPDF_LIMIT_MAX_STRING_LEN.
Cannot get pallet data from PNG image.
Dictionary elements > HPDF_LIMIT_MAX_DICT_ELEMENT
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
HPDF_SetEncryptMode() or HPDF_SetPermission() called before password set.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Tried to re-register a registered font.
Cannot register a character to the Japanese word wrap characters list.
1. Tried to set the owner password to NULL. 2. Owner and user password are the same.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Stack depth > HPDF_LIMIT_MAX_GSTATE.
Memory allocation failed.
File processing failed. (Detailed code is set.)
Cannot open a file. (Detailed code is set.)
Tried to load a font that has been registered.
1. Font-file format is invalid. 2. Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Cannot recognize header of afm file.
Specified annotation handle is invalid.
Bit-per-component of a image which was set as mask-image is invalid.
Cannot recognize char-matrics-data of afm file.
1. Invalid color_space parameter of HPDF_LoadRawImage. 2. Color-space of a image which was set as mask-image is invalid. 3. Invoked function invalid in present color-space.
Invalid value set when invoking HPDF_SetCommpressionMode().
An invalid date-time value was set.
An invalid destination handle was set.
An invalid document handle was set.
Function invalid in the present state was invoked.
An invalid encoder handle was set.
Combination between font and encoder is wrong.
An Invalid encoding name is specified.
Encryption key length is invalid.
1. An invalid font handle was set. 2. Unsupported font format.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Font with the specified name is not found.
Unsupported image format.
Unsupported image format.
Cannot read a postscript-name from an afm file.
1. An invalid object is set. 2. Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Invoked HPDF_Image_SetColorMask() against the image-object which was set a mask-image.
An invalid outline-handle was specified.
An invalid page-handle was specified.
An invalid pages-handle was specified. (internal error)
An invalid value is set.
Invalid PNG image format.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Internal error. "_FILE_NAME" entry for delayed loading is missing.
Invalid .TTC file format.
Index parameter < number of included fonts.
Cannot read a width-data from an afm file.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Error returned from PNGLIB while loading image.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
There are no graphics-states to be restored.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
The current font is not set.
An invalid font-handle was specified.
An invalid font-size was set.
See Graphics mode.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Specified value is not multiple of 90.
An invalid page-size was set.
An invalid image-handle was set.
The specified value is out of range.
The specified value is out of range.
Unexpected EOF marker was detected.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
The length of the text is too long.
Function not executed because of other errors.
Font cannot be embedded. (license restriction)
Unsupported ttf format. (cannot find unicode cmap)
Unsupported ttf format.
Unsupported ttf format. (cannot find a necessary table)
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
1. Library not configured to use PNGLIB. 2. Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Unsupported JPEG format.
Failed to parse .PFB file.
Internal error. Data consistency was lost.
Error while executing ZLIB function.
An invalid page index was passed.
An invalid URI was set.
An invalid page-layout was set.
An invalid page-mode was set.
An invalid page-num-style was set.
An invalid icon was set.
An invalid border-style was set.
An invalid page-direction was set.
An invalid font-handle was specified.
User can read the document.
User can print the document.
User can edit the contents of the document other than annotations, form fields.
User can copy the text and the graphics of the document.
User can add or modify the annotations and form fields of the document.
